user.title: Set up Composable Alarm Clock
user.description: Create a virtual alarm-clock workspace for your home.

abort.already_configured: A Composable Alarm Clock workspace is already configured

create_alarm.name: Create alarm

alarm_name.name: Alarm name
alarm_name.description: Display name for the virtual alarm

alarm_time.name: Alarm time
alarm_time.description: Daily time to trigger the alarm

enabled.description: Whether this alarm is currently active

target_entities.name: Target entities
target_entities.description: Entities to turn on when alarm triggers

target_services.description: Services to call when alarm triggers (domain.service)

delete_alarm.name: Delete alarm

integration_not_configured.message: Composable Alarm Clock is not configured yet.

invalid_alarm_name.message: The alarm name cannot be empty.

invalid_alarm_time.message: The alarm time is invalid. Use HH:MM or HH:MM:SS.
